name: api-traffic-simulator
description: Simulates normal and attack API traffic for testing the detection platform

scripts.normal:safe: cross-env SAFE_MODE=true ALLOW_WRITE_NORMAL=false ENABLE_RUSH_HOUR=false node run.js normal
scripts.attack:safe: cross-env SAFE_MODE=true ENABLE_BRUTE_FORCE=true ATTACK_SCALE=2 ATTACK_PACING_MS=80 node run.js attack
scripts.mixed:safe: cross-env SAFE_MODE=true ALLOW_WRITE_NORMAL=false ENABLE_BRUTE_FORCE=false ENABLE_RUSH_HOUR=false node run.js mixed
scripts.mixed:stress: cross-env SAFE_MODE=false ALLOW_WRITE_NORMAL=true ENABLE_BRUTE_FORCE=true ATTACK_SCALE=3 ENABLE_RUSH_HOUR=true RUN_DURATION_MS=600000 node run.js mixed
